quiz_items.question: Annual Reports must be submitted to CDRH by ______ each year for the year ending the preceding June 30.
quiz_items.explanation: Annual Reports summarizing required records must be submitted by September 1 of each year for the year ending the preceding June 30.

quiz_items.question: A manufacturer produces Class I and Class IIIb laser products. Which products require Supplemental Reports for model changes?
options: Both Class I and Class IIIb require Supplemental Reports
Only Class I requires Supplemental Reports
Only Class IIIb requires Supplemental Reports
quiz_items.explanation: Class I, IIa, II, and IIIa products do not require Supplemental Reports. Class IIIb and IV products require Supplemental Reports when criteria are met.
